Package org.areslib.pathplanner.dummy

package org.areslib.pathplanner.dummy
  • Class
    Description
    BooleanConsumer
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    Commands
    A dummy implementation of the WPILib Commands factory.
    DoubleArrayPublisher
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    DoublePublisher
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    DriverStation
    A dummy implementation of the WPILib DriverStation.
    DriverStation.Alliance
    Dummy representation of an FRC Alliance color.
    Filesystem
     
    FollowPathLTV
     
    FollowPathRamsete
     
    FRCNetComm
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.

    FRCNetComm.ResourceType
     
    FunctionalCommand
     
    GenericEntry
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    GenericPublisher
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    MathSharedStore
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    NetworkTable
    A dummy NetworkTable to allow PathPlanner configuration without NT4 dependencies.
    NetworkTableEntry
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    NetworkTableEvent
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    NetworkTableEvent.Kind
     
    NetworkTableInstance
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    NetworkTableListener
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    PathfindLTV
     
    PathfindRamsete
     
    RobotBase
    A dummy RobotBase mocking execution modes.
    Sendable
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    SendableBuilder
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    SendableChooser<V>
     
    SmartDashboard
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    StructArrayPublisher
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    StructPublisher
    A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
    Timer
    A dummy implementation of the WPILib Timer class to ensure compatibility with PathPlanner without requiring the full WPILib HAL or Android runtime.
    TrapezoidProfile
    A dummy TrapezoidProfile fallback implementation since ARESLib relies on native math profiles.
    TrapezoidProfile.Constraints
     
    TrapezoidProfile.State
     
    VecBuilder
